overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a rainy, foggy futuristic city. The player navigates wet sidewalks lined with reflective glass buildings, neon holographic advertisements, and dense crowds in the Japantown district, eventually crossing a busy intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk next to corporate glass building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beside a tall reflective glass building, approaching distant pedestrians

entered.detail: tall reflective glass building with horizontal paneling and glowing blue accent lighting at the base
curved elevated highway or monorail track spanning across the street in the distance
tall palm trees lining the street median, partially obscured by fog
modern black street lamps with rectangular illuminated panels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a rain-slicked sidewalk next to a massive glass building. The atmosphere is foggy and overcast, with palm trees visible across the street and an elevated highway structure looming in the distance. A few pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district sidewalk with holographic advertisements

events.description: pedestrian density increases significantly as camera enters the commercial district

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through a busier area, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and approaching vibrant neon signage

notable_agents.action: person holding an umbrella walking ahead of the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated billboards with pink and purple neon borders displaying advertisements
floating holographic displays and digital screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a denser commercial area with prominent neon billboards and holographic advertisements lining the street. The sidewalk becomes more crowded with pedestrians carrying umbrellas. The elevated highway structure shifts to the left side of the frame as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: Japantown district with heavy pedestrian traffic and robotic displays

events.description: entering Japantown district marked by distinct neon signage and architectural elements
pedestrian with red umbrella passes close to camera on the right side

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded Japantown sidewalk, passing a large stationary mech and various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: large military mech suit parked on the sidewalk with a person standing beside it

entered.detail: text overlay and environmental signage indicating the Japantown district
massive dark green military mech with glowing elements parked on the sidewalk
building corner wrapped in bright pink neon lighting and large digital displays

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the Japantown district, characterized by dense crowds and vibrant neon. A large military mech dominates the left sidewalk while pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the wet pavement. The environment is bustling with activity and illuminated by pink and purple neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with multi-directional traffic

events.description: camera turns right and steps onto the crosswalk to cross the street
crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk while futuristic vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at a crosswalk, then continuing along the opposite sidewalk past various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with visible cybernetic arm implants walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
tall building with blue-tinted glass windows on the opposite side of the street
thick industrial traffic light pole with multiple signal boxes and cables

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera crossing a wide intersection via a yellow-striped crosswalk, leaving the Japantown mech behind. After crossing, the view continues along the opposite sidewalk, passing a shirtless pedestrian with cybernetic implants and moving past more neon-lit buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a rain-slicked urban corridor that evolves from a foggy, open street into a dense, neon-lit commercial district. It begins by walking beside a massive glass building under an overcast sky, passing palm trees and a distant elevated highway. As the camera advances, the atmosphere shifts toward a more crowded environment where pedestrians with umbrellas fill the sidewalk. The scene then expands into a vibrant commercial zone dominated by glowing neon billboards and holographic advertisements, while the highway structure gradually shifts to the left of the frame.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through the vibrant Japantown district, transitioning from a crowded sidewalk into a wide urban intersection. It begins by pushing through dense crowds under the glow of pink and purple neon signs, passing a massive military mech that dominates the left side of the wet pavement. As the camera advances, the bustling sidewalk opens up into a wide intersection, where the view glides across a yellow-striped crosswalk and leaves the mech behind. The scene then shifts toward the opposite sidewalk, passing a shirtless pedestrian with cybernetic implants before continuing past a line of reflective, neon-lit buildings.
